rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee statements with labels and expressions
Use eq/const declarations for variable assignments
Use assign statements for output features or auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for contract logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Use valid AGREE syntax for assume/guarantee statements
Use valid AGREE syntax for eq/const declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
